headline: Apple reportedly plans to push iPhone 18 debut to 2027
summary: Apple Inc. is reportedly planning to postpone the launch of the iPhone 18 until 2027 due to manufacturing complexities and extended production development cycles, potentially leaving the iPhone 17 as the standard model for over 18 months. Industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo has also suggested a split launch strategy for Apple's flagship lineup, with the iPhone 18 Pro and a foldable iPhone arriving in late 2026, followed by the standard iPhone 18 in early 2027.
label: positive
